issues.detail: The skill does not specify how to handle missing or incomplete user input, leaving error scenarios unaddressed.
The reference to .claude/product-marketing-context.md assumes a Claude-specific environment, limiting cross-platform applicability.

scenarios.name: launch-saas-content-strategy
scenarios.rationale: Response B fully meets all rubric requirements, while Response A lacks explicit buyer stages, keyword details, research backing, and a clear topic cluster map.

scenarios.name: revamp-existing-blog-strategy
scenarios.rationale: Response A gives pillars and clusters but misses detailed topic prioritization, keyword, buyer stage, and a cluster map; Response B only requests more information and does not provide a strategy.
